case_title: HULIN,RICHARD DBA GLOBETROTTER TRAVEL SERVICE VS MR.VAEAO LIATAMA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $559.00 FILED BY HULIN,RICHARD DBA GLOBETROTTER TRAVEL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MR.VAEAO LIATAMA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-20-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
